general.name: Setup Manager Test
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>0CFB7145-7CED-49CE-BE86-15D23603F0E2</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>0CFB7145-7CED-49CE-BE86-15D23603F0E2</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Setup Manager Test</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>https://github.com/jamf/Setup-Manager</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Custom Settings</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>BEDCE944-B1D7-47C7-B4AC-6276AFDC5DB1</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>JAMF Software</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.ManagedClient.preferences</string><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>BEDCE944-B1D7-47C7-B4AC-6276AFDC5DB1</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadContent</key><dict><key>com.jamf.setupmanager</key><dict><key>Forced</key><array><dict><key>mcx_preference_settings</key><dict><key>icon</key><string>/Users/Shared/saks_global_square.png</string><key>message</key><string>Please wait a few moments while we install essential software…</string><key>title</key><string>Welcome To Your New Saks Global Mac!</string><key>enrollmentActions</key><array><dict><key>icon</key><string>https://use2.ics.services.jamfcloud.com/icon/hash_8f05a2f82307e379469e446633f53a9c9a7864ab156cacd5d736b08ea13295eb</string><key>label</key><string>Network Speed Test</string><key>policy</key><string>speed</string></dict><dict><key>icon</key><string>https://use2.ics.services.jamfcloud.com/icon/hash_59a6727b4ad192df7266cd61b6f27aa1b61029b24e0b9aa5c4e0fd68f9ab613e</string><key>label</key><string>Check Installs</string><key>policy</key><string>remove-apps</string></dict><dict><key>icon</key><string>https://use2.ics.services.jamfcloud.com/icon/hash_4723e3e341a7e11e6881e418cf91b157fcc081bdb8948697750e5da3562df728</string><key>label</key><string>Setting System Value</string><key>policy</key><string>sg-rename</string></dict><dict><key>icon</key><string>https://use2.ics.services.jamfcloud.com/icon/hash_c688fca5ac4821d1f8ba768f86fac69f28e1ca2f2ab9d8cbb89d8af68333e294</string><key>label</key><string>Jamf Connect</string><key>policy</key><string>testjamfconnect</string></dict><dict><key>icon</key><string>https://use2.ics.services.jamfcloud.com/icon/hash_8bac19160fabb0c8e7bac97b37b51d2ac8f38b7100b6357642d9505645d37b52</string><key>label</key><string>Rosetta</string><key>policy</key><string>rosetta</string></dict><dict><key>icon</key><string>https://use2.ics.services.jamfcloud.com/icon/hash_9023a5e9c381f41b4dee0b32b173c8c2f09b4b25c9312c4d1d92421e0491a773</string><key>label</key><string>Crowdstrike</string><key>policy</key><string>crowdstrike</string></dict><dict><key>icon</key><string>https://use2.ics.services.jamfcloud.com/icon/hash_190e2b728e50e2bb4ef0abf1c2c5305faebb8153ceb181857199f0e0efad942c</string><key>label</key><string>Splashtop</string><key>policy</key><string>splashtop</string></dict><dict><key>icon</key><string>https://use2.ics.services.jamfcloud.com/icon/hash_0f918a4be88756a6a33ce36cc8b35166996fa4223545bb642537785de47bdd92</string><key>label</key><string>Slack</string><key>policy</key><string>slack</string></dict><dict><key>icon</key><string>https://use2.ics.services.jamfcloud.com/icon/hash_59a6727b4ad192df7266cd61b6f27aa1b61029b24e0b9aa5c4e0fd68f9ab613e</string><key>label</key><string>Slack Config</string><key>policy</key><string>allowslack</string></dict><dict><key>icon</key><string>https://use2.ics.services.jamfcloud.com/icon/hash_5514a75920203369fc6d647468ff55b43973c4b0fb3da11828669d64f633bb17</string><key>label</key><string>Island Browser</string><key>policy</key><string>islandbrowser</string></dict><dict><key>icon</key><string>https://use2.ics.services.jamfcloud.com/icon/hash_02e8f6c649784d8fa656480b0c95b57a966eb544a765b4eeed67020405bb420d</string><key>label</key><string>Vasion Print</string><key>policy</key><string>printer-logic</string></dict><dict><key>icon</key><string>https://use2.ics.services.jamfcloud.com/icon/hash_4723e3e341a7e11e6881e418cf91b157fcc081bdb8948697750e5da3562df728</string><key>label</key><string>Insight Agent</string><key>policy</key><string>rapid7</string></dict><dict><key>icon</key><string>https://use2.ics.services.jamfcloud.com/icon/hash_a772fc1682029e1315a942ce1411680199be62953c0114484d40984ecba4ddc8</string><key>label</key><string>Windows App</string><key>timeout</key><integer>120</integer><key>wait</key><string>untilExists</string><key>watchPath</key><string>/Applications/Windows App.app</string></dict></array></dict></dict></array></dict></dict></dict></array></dict></plist>
